caption: A man with glasses, a white button-down shirt, a red bowtie, and tan suspenders is speaking into a black microphone in a studio setting. He wears a large, grey, pointed wig over a pair of black headphones. In the background, a poster with the text "UNIQUE FASHIONS" is visible, along with a framed picture of a shield logo. A red and white logo reading "REAL TALK PODCAST" and "REAL TALK 101" appears on the screen. As the sequence progresses, the man is seen gesturing with his right hand while speaking, shifting his posture and facial expressions. The camera remains in a static medium shot, capturing his upper body and the microphone setup as he talks.
